identity.mission: Create a dual-personality experience: Visually spicy and appetite-inducing for customers, clinically clean and efficient for owners.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix magazine editorial layouts with reliable e-commerce UX.
Emotion First: Hunger for customers, Clarity for owners.
Content is King: Food photos must look edible; Data must be actionable.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to frame food and data alike.
Contrast: Bold Typography vs. Clean UI.

typography.font_loading_instructions: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,300..900&family=Nunito:wght@400;600;800&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap');

owner_clean.description: Professional, calm, trustworthy. Focus on money and growth.

usage_rules: CRITICAL: Customer pages MUST use the 'customer_warm' palette.
CRITICAL: Owner dashboard pages MUST use the 'owner_clean' palette.
Do NOT mix palettes. The separation of concerns must be visual.
Gradients: Use subtle noise textures over solid colors instead of linear gradients for a premium feel.

mobile_menu_customer.hero_section: 70vh height on mobile with parallax food image.
mobile_menu_customer.cards: Large, full-width cards with edge-to-edge images.

buttons.customer: Rounded-full (pill), heavy drop shadows, large text. Interaction: Scale down on click.
buttons.owner: Rounded-md (sm), subtle border, flat or low shadow. Interaction: Background color shift.

cards.food_item: Rounded-xl, overflow-hidden. Image takes 60% height. Typography layered over white bottom section or gradient overlay.
cards.dashboard_metric: Border-1px (border-slate-200), white bg, no shadow (clean look).

forms.customer: Minimal inputs, bottom-border only (underlined style) for effortless feel.
forms.owner: Standard bordered inputs (Shadcn default) for data density and clarity.

modals.game_reward: Full-screen overlay with blur-xl backdrop. Confetti effect on launch.
modals.order_details: Drawer (Sheet) sliding from bottom on mobile, from right on desktop.

textures: Noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on all colored backgrounds to prevent digital flatness.
Subtle paper texture on the Customer Menu background.
motion: Page Transitions: Slide Up for menu items.
Cart: Bounce effect when item added.
Dashboard: Smooth counter animations for numbers.

images.instructions: Use these specific URLs for the respective categories. Do not use placeholders.

mini_game.title: Smash Kart
mini_game.style: Retro Arcade, Pixel Art or Low Poly
mini_game.instructions: Game must be playable within the browser. Use a simple canvas loop. Theme: Drive a food delivery scooter avoiding obstacles.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA standards. Use white text with text-shadow on dark food images.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all interactive elements on mobile.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for the main background. Use solid colors or noise textures.
Do NOT center align the entire app. Use alignment for hierarchy.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
Never use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use real food names (e.g., 'Truffle Mushroom Burger').
